# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - deploy

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE to production"
    - git config --global user.email "ci-deploy@$CI_PROJECT_NAME.com"
    - git config --global user.name "$CI_PROJECT_NAME"
    - git add .
    - git commit -m "Release: $CI_COMMIT_SHA, Deploy: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID - $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
  only:
    - main
    - /^deploy-.*$/
  tags:
    - deploy-tag-mr-title

build-notifications:
  stage: build-notifications
  script:
    - echo "Building and deploying $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - curl --request POST \
      --url https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/variables \
      --header 'Private-Token: $PRIVATE_TOKEN' \
      --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
      --data '{"key": "release_notes","value": "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"}'
  only:
    - main
